hook: Chronic stress can actually age your cells faster than you think.

script.hook: Did you know chronic stress might be aging your cells?
beats: Chronic stress keeps cortisol levels elevated, which can damage your brain and body.
Research shows that caregivers under stress can experience cellular aging equivalent to 10 years.
Managing stress through mindfulness or exercise can help reverse some of these effects.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of a clock speeding up to symbolize aging.
Animated graphic showing cortisol levels rising.
Footage of someone practicing mindfulness or exercising.
Text overlay summarizing the benefits of stress management.
